title: xanthophyllum obscurum
intro: Xanthophyllum obscurum is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the polygalaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum obscurum include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into extracts, infusions, or decoctions for use in traditional remedies.
